clusters.justification: These terms involve emotional reactivity, homeostatic autonomic arousal, and mood regulation, which functionally co-activate within the salience and limbic networks.
This encompasses the computation of subjective value, reward processing, and cost-benefit decision-making functionally localized to the ventral striatum and ventromedial prefrontal cortex.
These terms rely on the default mode network's capacity for internally directed thought, linking self-referential autobiographical memory with the modeling of others' mental states.
